creator: andy@athame.co.uk
text:
Due to hardware failure, I don't currently have a FreeBSD desktop 
machine, so can't test this change.

Since I'm not certain when or if I will have FreeBSD desktop access, I 
think it makes sense for me to drop maintainership of this port. Shane, 
if you want it, it's yours.

I did take a look through the change, and it looks ok, but as said, I 
can't verify.

Andy
